description: CompositionGreen polo neck t-shirt with short sleeves, made of 100% cotton, front buttoned placket, vented hem, and brand name and logo embroidered on the left chestFitSlimWash care Machine wash in 40 degrees with like colors Wash dark colors separately Normal tumble dry Warm iron Iron print on reverse Polo neck t-shirts are a must-have in every man's wardrobe, for the simple reason that they are smart, classic and versatile. This green polo neck tee from reebok is classy, elegant and neat. Made of pure cotton, it is comfortable and offers all-day comfort. Pair it with chinos or jeans and lifestyle footwear for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.3”, Shoulders-19"
